steps.title: Track the ranking pattern
steps.content: The researchers concluded that admirable-trait candidates stayed more likable than ignoble-trait candidates except among participants with high ignobility scores. The graph must show the usual ranking for lower scores and a change at higher scores.

steps.title: Match the high-score exception
steps.content: Participants with scores of 5 or less rated admirable-trait candidates higher, while those with scores of 6 or more rated ignoble-trait candidates equally or higher. A reverses the correlation, C discusses only admirable-trait ratings, and D focuses on difference itself rather than which type was rated higher. The answer is B.
